summary: A vivid audience capture of a solid ’82 performance with a standout 9‑minute Supplication and soaring Birdsong, though the venue boom is noticeable.
review: The recording conveys the hall’s acoustics and crowd energy well, offering very good sound despite some distracting boom from the venue. Musically the show shines with an exceptional Supplication and an out‑there Birdsong, placing it among the better concerts of 1982, even if one listener felt the overall set wasn’t great.

ai_rating.rationale: Show quality is praised for specific performances but noted as not great by a reviewer; recording quality is consistently rated very good, leading to an overall rating in the high‑mid range.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Captures crowd mood and hall acoustics nicely, but has a noticeable venue boom that can distract from the music.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set highlighted by an extended Supplication; second set mixes it up and is regarded as among the top shows of ’82, though overall excitement was seen as moderate.
